title: Minecraft But Random Hearts
description: This datapack makes survival even more unpredictable. every 30 seconds, your maximum health (hearts) is randomized between 2 and 20 hearts.
body:
![hearts](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ab34947a291823aa5f2a240a212790c7b5097f6.jpeg)

The **Random Hearts datapack** adds a chaotic twist to Minecraft survival. Every 30 seconds, your maximum health changes to a random value! One moment you might have only 2 hearts, and the next you could have 20. This keeps the game unpredictable and forces you to constantly adapt.

**Features**
- ⏱️ Automatic heart changes: Every 30 seconds your maximum hearts are randomized.
- 🎲 Unpredictable gameplay: Never know how much health you’ll have next.
- ⚔️ Survival challenge: Makes fights, exploration, and survival more intense.
- 🌍 Multiplayer ready: Fun chaos when playing with friends on a server.

**Compatibility**
- ✅ Minecraft 1.21.2 and above
- 🛠️ Works in both singleplayer and multiplayer
- 📂 Easy installation with no mods required

**Installation**
1. Download the .zip file.
1. Put it inside your world’s datapacks folder.
1. Run /reload in-game.

Watch your hearts change every 30 seconds!
